summary: Private League Creation Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: UI elements verified correctly. Main issue found: Auth token timing issue when navigating directly to /league/create causes 'Nessuna stagione attiva trovata' error. Backend APIs fully functional.

integration_issues.issue: When navigating directly to /league/create URL after login, the seasons API call sometimes returns 401 because auth token is not yet available in useAuth() context. Shows 'Nessuna stagione attiva trovata' error.
integration_issues.workaround: Navigate to create page via app navigation (from onboarding/home) rather than direct URL

results.test_get_active_seasons: PASSED - GET /api/leagues/seasons returns active season 'Serie A 2024-2025'
results.test_create_league_with_full_config: PASSED - POST /api/leagues creates league with all fields (scoring_config, start_matchday, end_matchday, bet_deadline_minutes, match_source_type, invite_code, rules_locked=false)
results.test_get_league_detail: PASSED - GET /api/leagues/{id} returns league details with scoring_config
results.test_join_league_and_rules_lock: PASSED - POST /api/leagues/join with invite_code works, auto-locks rules when member_count > 1
results.test_join_with_invalid_code: PASSED - POST /api/leagues/join returns 404 for invalid invite_code

elements_verified: NOME LEGA input with placeholder 'Es. Champions Friends' and char counter (0/40)
GIORNATE section with Inizio (Giornata 1) and Fine (Giornata 38) dropdowns
TERMINE ULTIMO GIOCATA dropdown with options (0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, 45, 60 minutes)
PARTITE DA PRONOSTICARE with 'Lega Nazionale' and 'Scelte dal creatore' options
SISTEMA PUNTI section with 4 markets: 1X2 (1pt), Over/Under 2.5 (0.5pt), Goal/No Goal (0.5pt), Risultato Esatto (4pt)
Toggle switches for enabling/disabling each market
Point input fields for each market
Description text for entering invite code
Code input field with data-testid='join-code-input' and placeholder 'XXXXXXXX'

action_items: INVESTIGATE: Auth token timing issue in /league/create - useAuth() token may be null on first render causing seasons API 401. Consider: 1) Add loading state while token loads, 2) Retry API call when token becomes available, 3) Guard route with auth check before rendering form
critical_code_review_comments: The create.tsx useEffect depends on [token] but if token is initially undefined, the API call fires and fails. Consider adding a check: if (!token) return; in the useEffect before calling apiCall
Backend APIs are well implemented with proper validation and auto-lock mechanism for rules_locked
Frontend form has good UX with real-time validation (name length, matchday range)

success_rate.frontend: 85% (UI correct, auth timing issue on direct navigation)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_* leagues during backend testing (TEST_Liga_Privata_*, TEST_Detail_*, TEST_Update_*, TEST_Join_*, TEST_Locked_*). Active season 'Serie A 2024-2025' already exists in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Private league creation feature is fully working via backend APIs. Frontend UI is correct. Issue: Direct URL navigation to /league/create may fail to load seasons due to auth timing. Navigate through app instead. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_league_creation.py covers all API endpoints.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The create.tsx component calls apiCall('/leagues/seasons', { token }) in useEffect([token]). When navigating directly to the URL, the AuthContext may not have loaded the token from AsyncStorage yet, causing the API call to fire with undefined/null token resulting in 401 Unauthorized.
reproduction_steps: After successful login, navigate directly to /league/create via URL bar
rca_of_the_issue.potential_mitigation: Add guard in useEffect: if (!token) return; before API call, OR add isLoading check from AuthContext to show spinner until auth state is ready
